title: Second Conditional
description: Hypothetical present/future with if + past simple, would + base verb
summary_pt_br: Segundo condicional — if + passado simples, would + verbo base, para situações hipotéticas.

exercises.question: If I ___ rich, I would travel the world.
exercises.explanation: Formal second conditional uses 'were' for all subjects (though 'was' is common in speech).
exercises.hint_pt_br: Na forma culta, usamos 'were' para todos os sujeitos no segundo condicional.

exercises.question: If she ___ (have) more time, she would learn Japanese.
exercises.explanation: Past simple in the if clause even though the meaning is hypothetical present/future.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Passado simples no 'if', mesmo com sentido presente/futuro hipotético.

pairs: If I knew, I would tell you.
Se eu soubesse, eu te diria.
If we had a car, we'd drive.
If you asked, I would help.
If they tried, they could win.
